introSection: The Bat is a Vekoma inverted roller coaster located at Lagoon in Farmington, Utah, USA. The ride was originally scheduled to open on the opening day of the 2005 season on April 9, but the opening was delayed by a week.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The Bat is a 342m Suspended Family Coaster from Vekoma, similar to many other rides of this type.

fullText:
The Bat is a Vekoma inverted roller coaster located at Lagoon in Farmington, Utah, USA. The ride was originally scheduled to open on the opening day of the 2005 season on April 9, but the opening was delayed by a week.

The Bat is a 342m Suspended Family Coaster from Vekoma, similar to many other rides of this type.
